drifts.description: Extension slice 'chronicDisease' (profile: https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-chronic-disease) replaced by 'trialReportedCondition' (profile: https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-trial-reported). This represents a change in the intended semantic meaning of the extension.
Extension slice name changed from 'chronicDisease' to 'trialReportedCondition'.
MustSupport flag added for extension slice 'trialReportedCondition'.
Minimum cardinality for 'Condition.clinicalStatus' changed from 1 to 0. The element is no longer mandatory.
Value set binding 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-category' (extensible) removed from 'Condition.category' in the target profile. This removes a constraint on allowed codes.
Value set binding 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-severity' (extensible) removed from 'Condition.severity' in the target profile. This removes a constraint on allowed codes.
Element 'Condition.bodySite' present in source profile but removed in target profile. Data for this element will be lost if migrated.
Reference target profile for 'Condition.subject' changed from 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient' to 'https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient'.
Reference target profile constraint for 'Condition.encounter' removed. Source constrained to 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter', target allows any Reference.
Minimum cardinality for 'Condition.onset[x]' changed from 1 to 0. The element is no longer mandatory.
Maximum cardinality for 'Condition.recorder' changed from '*' to '0'. The element is prohibited in the target profile.
Reference target profile constraint for 'Condition.recorder' removed. Source constrained to 'https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner', target prohibits the element.
MustSupport flag removed for 'Condition.recorder'.
Short description added for 'Condition.recorder': 'Recorder blinded in research context'.
Maximum cardinality for 'Condition.asserter' changed from '*' to '0'. The element is prohibited in the target profile.
MustSupport flag removed for 'Condition.asserter'.
Short description added for 'Condition.asserter': 'Asserter blinded in research context'.
Element 'Condition.note' present in source profile but removed in target profile. Data for this element will be lost if migrated.
Type profile constraint changed: [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-chronic-disease] â [https://iit-proj.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/condition-trial-reported]
MustSupport added in target
